title: Dependent SSN Validation During Enrollment
description: The system shall validate dependent Social Security Number (SSN) data during dependent creation and enrollment submission. Dependents with failed SSN validation shall be flagged and prevented from progressing to carrier enrollment.

aiRequirementsEngineering.sourceDocumentSignal: Carrier Requirements PDF — Carrier requires dependent SSN for enrollment transactions
aiRequirementsEngineering.existingSystemGap: Dependent enrollment exists; SSN field captured; no validation rule defined

aiGapAnalysis.aiGeneratedRequirement: REQ-DEP-SSN-001: The system shall validate dependent SSNs before allowing dependent enrollment to proceed to carrier submission.

aiRequirementsEngineering.traceabilityChain: Carrier Requirement → AI-Generated Requirement → Dependent Validation Rule → Test Case CT-10045 → Validation Failure → Carrier Transaction Blocked → Employee Notification → Admin Resolution → Audit Trail

title: SSN Format and Length Validation
description: The system shall validate dependent SSN format and length. Accepted input formats are XXX-XX-XXXX (formatted) and XXXXXXXXX (unformatted). The system shall normalize unformatted input to XXX-XX-XXXX. Validation shall reject: fewer than 9 digits, more than 9 digits, alphabetic characters, invalid formatting, and known invalid patterns.

title: Reject Known Invalid SSN Patterns
description: The system shall reject known invalid SSN patterns beyond format errors, including: all-zero area/group/serial segments, all-same-digit sequences (111-11-1111), test number patterns, and any pattern designated as invalid by applicable policy.

title: Distinguish Format Validation from Identity Verification
description: The system shall distinguish between SSN format validation (syntactic check) and identity verification (the SSN belongs to the named dependent). A syntactically valid SSN does not prove it belongs to the dependent. The system shall support three validation levels: FORMAT_VALID (format passes), IDENTITY_VERIFIED (verified against third-party service), VALIDATION_UNAVAILABLE (verification service not available).
demoNote: The demo simulates identity verification with a mock validation service. Integration with an external identity verification provider is treated as a configurable enhancement.

title: Duplicate SSN Detection Within Employer Group
description: The system shall detect potential duplicate SSNs by comparing new or updated dependent SSN values against existing dependent records within the same employer group. A duplicate detection shall create an exception record with status DUPLICATE and shall not automatically overwrite or delete either record.

demoExample.case: SSN matches existing record for Mary Brown
demoExample.systemAction: Create DUPLICATE exception — require HR review before proceeding

title: Dependent Validation Exception on SSN Failure
description: The system shall create a dependent validation exception record when SSN validation fails. The exception shall capture: dependent ID, employee ID, validation result, failure reason, validation timestamp, exception status, and associated case ID.

title: Block Carrier Enrollment Transactions for Invalid Dependents
description: The system shall prevent carrier enrollment transaction submission when a required dependent SSN validation has not passed. The transaction status shall be set to BLOCKED with reasonCode DEPENDENT_INVALID_SSN. The block shall apply only to carriers that require dependent SSN.

title: Administrator Exception Review and Resolution
description: The system shall allow authorized Benefits Administrators to review dependent validation exceptions, view the dependent record, see the validation failure reason, and take corrective action: request employee correction, submit manual override with reason, or close as invalid.

title: Administrative Override Process with Audit
description: The system shall support an authorized administrative override allowing enrollment to proceed for a dependent with a validation exception. Every override shall require a documented reason, override actor identity, and role. Override events shall be written to the immutable audit trail.

title: Audit Trail for SSN Validation Failures, Corrections, and Overrides
description: The system shall write audit events for: dependent SSN validation failure, employee correction submission, correction applied, administrative override approved, carrier transaction blocked, and carrier transaction unblocked after resolution. Audit events shall record the validation result but shall never record the full SSN value.

title: Employee Notification on Dependent Validation Failure
description: The system shall send an ACTION_REQUIRED notification to the employee when dependent SSN validation fails. The notification shall identify the dependent by name, state that information requires correction, provide a link to update the dependent record, and shall not include the full SSN value.

notificationTemplate.subject: Action Required: Dependent Information Needs Correction
notificationTemplate.body: We were unable to validate the Social Security Number for {{dependent.firstName}} {{dependent.lastName}}. Please review and correct the information before submitting your benefits enrollment.
notificationTemplate.privacyRule: Do not include full SSN in email or in-app notification body

title: SSN Masking in All UI Displays and Notifications
description: The system shall never display a full SSN in standard UI displays, notifications, or audit records. Masked format shall be XXX-XX-XXXX (last 4 configurable). Full SSN shall only be accessible to authorized roles in the dependent editing UI with explicit reveal action.

securityControls.audit: Record validation event, not full SSN

title: SSN Encryption at Rest and in Transit
description: The system shall encrypt dependent SSN values at rest using field-level encryption. SSN data shall only be transmitted over TLS-encrypted channels. SSN plaintext shall not appear in server logs, application logs, or error messages.

title: Configurable Dependent Identification Requirements by Plan and Carrier
description: The system shall support configurable dependent identification requirements per plan and carrier. Not every carrier or plan requires a dependent SSN. SSN requirement shall be defined in the carrier integration configuration, not universally assumed for all plans.
configurationNote: SSN is required for Acme's Medical and Dental carriers per seed data. Configurable per carrier record.

title: Dependent Validation Status and History
description: Each dependent record shall maintain a current validation status and a history of validation events. The history shall record each validation attempt, result, and resolution action. Enrollment eligibility decisions referencing dependent validation shall link to the applicable validation history record.
